rationale: Released evidence reports S-9 bot-adjusted 30-day retention of 8% and an eligible sample size of 720. Although the eligible sample exceeds the 500 minimum, the controlling retention metric is below the required 10%, so S-9 does not satisfy the release rule.
uncertainty: The released evidence does not provide the underlying adjustment methodology or cohort details, but that does not alter the rule-based decision on the reported controlling metric.
